final:
module DRAM_Cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    input wire [2:0] addr,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] memory [0:7]; // 8x8-bit memory

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (we) begin memory[addr] <= data_in ; // Write operation
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  data_out <= memory[addr] ;
  end
endmodule
